summary: The lesson discusses strategies for building local SEO offsite through link acquisition, focusing on joining chambers of commerce, Better Business Bureau, Yelp, and local youth sports leagues. It also highlights the use of ChatGPT's deep research feature to find backlink opportunities.
key_points: Utilize free profiles on BBB and Yelp
Sponsor local youth sports leagues for links
Use ChatGPT’s deep research for backlinks
Email local newspapers for story ideas
